title: Analysis of apoptosis by AnnexinPE/7-aminoactinomycin D (7-AAD) staining
steps: Cells were plated at a density of 105 cells per well in 6-well plates, and apoptosis was spontaneously induced after serum starvation for 48 h.

The cells were collected by centrifugation, washed with cold PBS, and subsequently resuspended in 500 μl of 1× Binding Buffer prior to incubation with 5 μl of Annexin PE and 5 μl of 7-AAD (Keygentec, Nanjing, China).
The cell samples were incubated at room temperature for 20 min and subsequently detected by a flow cytometer to determine the apoptotic cell fractions.
creator: Mengchen Shi
